overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival game showing a character traversing a landscaped park area at night. The environment features stone pathways, circular planters, water features, and abandoned camp structures under a dark blue overcast sky with atmospheric lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved stone walkway with retaining wall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the curved stone pathway bordered by a retaining wall

entered.detail: stone tile pathway curving gently to the left
low concrete wall with curved top edge running alongside the path
tall evergreen trees surrounding the pathway

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a curved stone pathway at night, bordered by a concrete retaining wall on the right and surrounded by tall evergreen trees. The environment is dimly lit with a cool blue tone.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular garden with planters and benches

events.description: exits the curved walkway and enters an open garden area with circular planters and grass

agents.ego_description: walking through the garden area past circular stone planters and benches

entered.detail: large circular raised planter with stone walls and vegetation inside
wooden and metal park bench situated on the grass
bushes with red flowers alongside the path

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the enclosed pathway into an open garden area featuring circular stone planters, grassy patches, and park benches. Flowering bushes line the right side of the path as the character continues forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: pathway alongside water features with abandoned supplies

events.description: approaches a dark water pool with stone benches and scattered camp supplies

agents.ego_description: walking along the paved path next to a still water feature

entered.detail: dark still water basin with stone edges reflecting the night sky
concrete bench facing the water feature
scattered crates, blue barrel, and wooden pallets suggesting temporary encampment

segments.scene_description: The character walks alongside a dark water feature with stone benches on the left. Abandoned camp supplies including crates and a blue barrel are visible in a clearing to the left, suggesting a temporary settlement area.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone bridge leading to mountain overlook with camp

events.description: crosses a stone bridge toward an illuminated camping tent
approaches the warm artificial light emanating from the camping tent

agents.ego_description: crossing the stone bridge and approaching the overlook camp area

entered.detail: short stone bridge with low walls crossing over the water feature
illuminated canvas tent with light glowing from inside
distant forested mountains visible against the night sky
metal chain link fencing with wooden posts
tall stone columns marking the entrance to the overlook area

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a stone bridge toward an open overlook area with an illuminated camping tent. The landscape opens up to reveal distant mountains under the dark sky, with chain link fencing and stone pillars marking the boundaries of the viewpoint.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit park that transitions from an enclosed forest path into an expansive mountain overlook. It begins along a curved stone pathway bordered by a concrete wall and tall evergreen trees under a cool blue night sky. As the character moves forward, the enclosed trail opens into a garden area characterized by circular stone planters, grassy patches, and flowering bushes. The scene then shifts toward a dark water feature and a clearing filled with abandoned camp supplies, including crates and a blue barrel, before the camera crosses a stone bridge. Finally, the landscape expands into an open viewpoint featuring an illuminated camping tent, chain link fencing, and a distant view of mountains under the dark horizon.
